name: whatsapp_send_image
description: Send an image message with optional caption to a WhatsApp user. Supports JPEG, PNG formats up to 5MB.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Registered WhatsApp sender number in E.164 format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Recipient WhatsApp phone number in E.164 format.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Image content with 'mediaUrl' (string, URL of the image) and optional 'caption' (string).
